nasb.text: These twenty years I have been with you; your ewes and your female goats have not miscarried, nor have I eaten the rams of your flocks.

esv.text: These twenty years I have been with you. Your ewes and your female goats have not miscarried, and I have not eaten the rams of your flocks.

cnv.text: 這二十年來，我與你在一起；你的母綿羊和母山羊沒掉過胎，你羊群中的公羊，我沒有吃過。

ccb.text: 我在你家这二十年，你的母绵羊、母山羊没有掉过胎，我也没有吃过你公羊的肉。

csbs.text: 这二十年来，我与你在一起；你的母绵羊、母山羊没有流过产；你羊群中的公绵羊，我也没有吃过。
